languages.text: "Ты пережил серьезную операцию — имплантам требуется время, чтобы прижиться, а твоему телу и разуму — чтобы адаптироваться. Я обещаю, тебе станет легче".
"You have undergone a grave operation — the implants need time to settle, and your body and mind need time to adapt. I promise you will feel better."
languages.original_text: "Ты пережил серьезную операцию — имплантам требуется время, чтобы прижиться, а твоему телу и разуму — чтобы адаптироваться. Я обещаю, тебе станет легче".

traits.locale_text: "You have undergone a grave operation — the implants need time to settle, and your body and mind need time to adapt. I promise you will feel better."
"You have undergone a grave operation — the implants need time to settle, and your body and mind need time to adapt. I promise you will feel better."
"You have undergone a grave operation — the implants need time to settle, and your body and mind need time to adapt. I promise you will feel better."

languages.text: 「あなたは重篤な手術を受けました。インプラントは落ち着くのに時間がかかり、あなたの心身は適応するのに時間がかかる。良くなるだろう」
languages.original_text: "You have undergone a grave operation — the implants need time to settle, and your body and mind need time to adapt. I promise you will feel better."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたは重篤な手術を受けました。インプラントは落ち着くのに時間がかかり、あなたの心身は適応するのに時間がかかります。あなたは良くなるでしょう」

languages.text: “你刚刚经历了一场大手术，植入物需要时间来稳定，你的身心也需要时间去适应。但我保证，你会好起来的。”
languages.original_text: "You have undergone a grave operation — the implants need time to settle, and your body and mind need time to adapt. I promise you will feel better."

traits.locale_text: “你刚刚经历了一场大手术，植入物需要时间来稳定，你的身心也需要时间去适应。但我保证，你会好起来的。”

languages.text: « Vous avez subi une opération majeure. Il faut du temps pour permettre à vos implants de se fixer et vous y habituer aussi bien physiquement que mentalement. Vous finirez par vous sentir mieux, je vous le promets. »
languages.original_text: "You have undergone a grave operation — the implants need time to settle, and your body and mind need time to adapt. I promise you will feel better."

traits.locale_text: « Vous avez subi une opération majeure. Il faut du temps pour permettre à vos implants de se fixer et vous y habituer aussi bien physiquement que mentalement. Vous finirez par vous sentir mieux, je vous le promets. »

languages.text: «Ha pasado por una operación muy seria: los implantes necesitan tiempo para asentarse, y su cuerpo y su mente, tiempo para adaptarse. Le prometo que se sentirá mejor».
languages.original_text: "You have undergone a grave operation — the implants need time to settle, and your body and mind need time to adapt. I promise you will feel better."

traits.locale_text: «Ha pasado por una operación muy seria: los implantes necesitan tiempo para asentarse, y su cuerpo y su mente, tiempo para adaptarse. Le prometo que se sentirá mejor».

languages.text: "Ciddi bir ameliyat geçirdin. İmplantların yerleşmesi için zamana ihtiyacı var, bedeninin ve zihninin de uyum sağlaması için zamana ihtiyacı var. Sana söz veriyorum, kendini daha iyi hissedeceksin."
languages.original_text: "You have undergone a grave operation — the implants need time to settle, and your body and mind need time to adapt. I promise you will feel better."

traits.locale_text: "Ciddi bir ameliyat geçirdin. İmplantların yerleşmesi için zamana ihtiyacı var, bedeninin ve zihninin de uyum sağlaması için zamana ihtiyacı var. Sana söz veriyorum, kendini daha iyi hissedeceksin."

languages.text: "Ihr wurdet einer ernsten Operation unterzogen ... die Implantate müssen sich erst beruhigen, und Euer Körper und Geist braucht Zeit, sich anzupassen. Ich verspreche Euch, bald fühlt Ihr Euch besser."
languages.original_text: "You have undergone a grave operation — the implants need time to settle, and your body and mind need time to adapt. I promise you will feel better."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr wurdet einer ernsten Operation unterzogen ... die Implantate müssen sich erst beruhigen, und Euer Körper und Geist braucht Zeit, sich anzupassen. Ich verspreche Euch, bald fühlt Ihr Euch besser."
